# Nfc

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Nfc icon">

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Tags
contactless, payment, near-field communication

## Categories
communication, finance, devices

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/nfc)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Nfc;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Nfc { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
